title: Evangelion Tattoos
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Tattoos             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Jun 27, 2008 11:16 pm Fuckin post em. http://img524.imageshack.us/img524/7715/1205120690996ho2.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Jun 27, 2008 11:34 pm I want to get one, I haven't drawn up the design for it yet, will post when I do.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sat Jun 28, 2008 12:38 am Asuka's gonna look really flabby when that guy hits 70....

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jun 28, 2008 12:57 am I saw a really cool Sachiel one on google once. Could never find it again. I swear, if I was weeaboo enough, I'd tattoo a core on my chest, along with Sachiel's rib cage thingy.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jun 28, 2008 2:33 am http://www.tesuji.org/als_images/1202349708650.jpg I think that's all I have.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jun 28, 2008 10:46 am Then there's that Gainax top page picture...

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Jun 28, 2008 12:45 pm Ornette wrote: http://www.tesuji.org/als_images/1157044304869.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Sat Jun 28, 2008 1:29 pm CorporalChaos wrote: Asuka's gonna look really flabby when that guy hits 70....

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sat Jun 28, 2008 2:06 pm ^ A love of Eva + Tattoos + 60 years = Whoa, Asuka, Rei, Misato? Have you all gained weight? You're all flabby.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jun 28, 2008 8:12 pm Ornette wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 01, 2008 5:06 pm When in San Fran the other day, I saw a photo of Rei in her plugsuit on a guy's shoulder (It was AyanamiOtaku, wasn't it!) . It was pretty cool looking.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Jan 30, 2009 9:47 pm Alright, bumping an old thread here. I have finished my design here for my tattoo I wish to get. I know there is a lot of eraser marks but seeing as this will be etched on my skin I kinda wanted to perfect it. Placing here for questions, comments, advice? All critique appreciated! Thanks! [URL=http://s262.photobucket.com/albums/ii112/IrkenEvangelion/?action=view&current=Tattoo.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Sat Jan 31, 2009 12:14 am O.O! Oh GOD!!! Why would anyone want to put that on their body? And... back tattoos are never good!!! (there is such a thing as back acne!!! >.<) :(

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat Jan 31, 2009 12:19 am You'll forever have 'disgusting' on your body...I'd rethink that. Also, if you do go with that I hope you have the artist redesign it or at least clean it up a bit. Personally I'd never get things related to bands, movies, anime and the like, but if you're into it knock yourself out. I'd rethink "kimochi warui" though. Unless you just want some Japanese because it looks cool, regardless of meaning. I dunno what other Asuka quotes would be better...死ぬのはいや (I don't want to die) maybe, but that still seems lame...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 31, 2009 1:03 am I didn't think a lot of people actually had tattoos based on anime... It was always kind of a scary thought to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Jan 31, 2009 7:46 am Wait two years before you get the tattoo. Then get it if you still want to. But my opinion is you will be making a giant mistake that you will regret much later on.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Jan 31, 2009 11:37 am ZapalacX wrote: I dunno what other Asuka quotes would be better...

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat Jan 31, 2009 12:14 pm Well thanks but no thanks. And who said it'd go on my back? Anyways... I put thought into it and everything's on there for a purpose, so no offense, but I don't care.

[]:             Quote Post by Deathmask » Sat Jan 31, 2009 12:33 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: Alright, bumping an old thread here. I have finished my design here for my tattoo I wish to get. I know there is a lot of eraser marks but seeing as this will be etched on my skin I kinda wanted to perfect it. Placing here for questions, comments, advice? All critique appreciated! Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat Jan 31, 2009 1:58 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: no offense, but I don't care.
